top_stories.title: What happens when AI starts building itself?
top_stories.description: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products.
top_stories.author: Russell Brandom
top_stories.content: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products.

top_stories.title: NVIDIA Introduces SANA-WM: A 2.6B-Parameter Open-Source World Model That Generates Minute-Scale 720p Video on a Single GPU
top_stories.description: Researchers from NVIDIA introduce SANA-WM, an open-source camera-controlled world model that generates 60-second, 720p videos with precise 6-DoF camera control — trained on 64 H100 GPUs and deployable on a single RTX 5090. The post NVIDIA Introduces SANA-WM: A 2.6B-Parameter Open-Source World Model That Generates Minute-Scale 720p Video on a Single GPU appeared first on MarkTechPost.
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
top_stories.content: Researchers from NVIDIA introduce SANA-WM, an open-source camera-controlled world model that generates 60-second, 720p videos with precise 6-DoF camera control — trained on 64 H100 GPUs and deployable on a single RTX 5090. The post NVIDIA Introduces SANA-WM: A 2.6B-Parameter Open-Source World Model That Generates Minute-Scale 720p Video on a Single GPU appeared first on MarkTechPost.

top_stories.title: Overcoming reward signal challenges: Verifiable rewards-based reinforcement learning with GRPO on SageMaker AI
top_stories.description: In this post, you will learn how to implement reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) to introduce verification and transparency into reward signals to improve training performance. This approach works best when outputs can be objectively verified for correctness, such as in mathematical reasoning, code generation, or symbolic manipulation tasks. You will also learn how to layer techniques like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and few-shot examples to further improve...
top_stories.author: Surya Kari
top_stories.content: In this post, you will learn how to implement reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) to introduce verification and transparency into reward signals to improve training performance. top_stories.title: Introducing Claude Platform on AWS: Anthropic’s native platform, through your AWS account
top_stories.description: Today, we're excited to announce the general availability of Claude Platform on AWS. Claude Platform on AWS is a new service that gives customers direct access to Anthropic's native Claude Platform experience through their AWS account, with no separate credentials, contracts, or billing relationships required. AWS is the first cloud provider to offer access to the native Claude Platform experience. In this post, we explore how Claude Platform on AWS works and how you can start using it today.
top_stories.author: Dani Mitchell
top_stories.content: Today, we're excited to announce the general availability of Claude Platform on AWS. top_stories.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
top_stories.description: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
top_stories.content: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
